meaning: n.施舍,救济物(钱,食物,衣物等)
examples: Give us some alms, we beg of you!
I hear that a great man doesn't drink a thief's water or accept alms.
The old lady gave the old soldier alms, and went into the church with Karen.
Barefoot monks holding alms bowls share the streets with scooters, battered cars and cycle rickshaws.
When he turns away an opportunity for alms giving, he uses the zero growth rationale.
